query: glitch art pixel sorting digital corruption datamoshing
message: sub:digital_artifacts/glitch — anti_aesthetic — pixel sorting, color shifts, datamosh, digital corruption

response.objective_caption: A cylindrical metal pipe joins a corner where two vertical surfaces meet; broad leaves on thin stems appear in the lower left foreground, and numerous dark vertical streaks and spots are scattered across the wall, pipe, and surrounding space.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A corner view of a metal pipe meeting two vertical surfaces, suffused with a harsh violet and white color cast that suggests chemical contamination; extreme contrast has crushed darker tones and blown out large areas to pure white, obscuring detail, while dark vertical drips and splatters stain the surfaces like rot or filth, provoking a visceral sense of aversion and an uneasy, foreboding atmosphere.
